summary: Shopping List Chore Feature Enhancement - All features verified and working. Fixed a bug where store purchases only updated the first matching shopping chore instead of all matching chores. Backend: 20/21 tests passed (1 skipped due to insufficient balance). Frontend: All UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ POST /api/parent/shopping-list/create-chore - creates chore with is_shopping_chore=true flag
✅ POST /api/parent/shopping-list/create-chore - creates chore with shopping_item_details array (item_id, item_name, item_price, quantity, purchased)
✅ GET /api/child/shopping-list - returns shopping items from active chores with purchased status
✅ GET /api/child/shopping-list - only accessible by children (403 for parent)
✅ GET /api/parent/children-purchases - returns grouped purchase history by child
✅ GET /api/parent/children-purchases - only accessible by parents (403 for child)
✅ GET /api/parent/children-purchases - includes from_shopping_chore flag for purchases
✅ POST /api/child/shopping-list/{item_id}/mark-purchased - marks item as purchased in ALL matching chores
✅ Store purchase auto-marks shopping list item as purchased (fixed bug)
✅ Frontend: Child's store page shows 'Your Shopping List' section with checklist
✅ Frontend: Shopping list items show chore title and purchased status
✅ Frontend: Store items in shopping list have '📋 On List!' badge
✅ Frontend: Parent dashboard shows 'Children's Purchases' button
✅ Frontend: Children's Purchases dialog shows grouped purchases by child
✅ Frontend: Purchases from shopping chores have 'From Chore' badge (highlighted)
✅ All 12 original shopping list bugfix tests still pass (backward compatibility)

bug_fixed.description: Store purchase and mark-purchased endpoints only updated the FIRST matching shopping chore instead of ALL matching chores
bug_fixed.root_cause: update_one() was used which only updates the first document matching the query. When multiple active shopping chores had the same item_id, only one would be updated.
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Changed to find all matching chores first, then update each one individually using a loop

critical_code_review_comments: Shopping chore creation correctly sets is_shopping_chore=true and shopping_item_details array
Child shopping list endpoint correctly extracts items from active shopping chores
Children purchases endpoint correctly groups purchases by child with from_shopping_chore flag
Store purchase now updates ALL matching shopping chores (bug fix applied)
Minor: Dialog accessibility warnings in console - aria-describedby missing
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/store.py - Fixed update_one to update ALL matching shopping chores
/app/backend/tests/test_shopping_chore_enhancement.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features

success_rate.backend: 95% (20/21 tests passed, 1 skipped due to insufficient balance)

seed_data_creation: Created test shopping chores during testing, cleaned up after verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shopping list chore feature enhancement verified. All endpoints working: (1) create-chore sets is_shopping_chore=true and shopping_item_details array, (2) GET /api/child/shopping-list returns items from active chores, (3) GET /api/parent/children-purchases returns grouped purchases with from_shopping_chore flag, (4) Store purchases auto-mark shopping items as purchased in ALL matching chores. Test files: /app/backend/tests/test_shopping_chore_enhancement.py and /app/backend/tests/test_shopping_list_bugfix.py. Test users: Parent Alka M (user_22d32d6b6d43), Child Aashi M (user_cd3928036bf4).
